root_cause_candidates.cause: ts-auth-service is experiencing delay/latency spikes (high p95/p99 and CPU load) which propagate downstream, causing ts-preserve-service to exhibit delays and elevated activity.
root_cause_candidates.reasoning: Strong metric-based signals in ts-auth-service and the downstream impact observed on ts-preserve-service align with a latency-driven fault in ts-auth-service. Although Topology Agent shows no structural path from ts-preserve-service to ts-auth-service, the unobserved root-cause possibility is acknowledged (ts-auth-service may not be represented in the given topology). The TCB-RCA baseline places the symptom at ts-preserve-service (depth=0) and does not contradict a root cause in ts-auth-service when considering unobserved paths; however, the log-based evidence for ts-auth-service is more credible for the actual fault than the topology snapshot alone.

final_verdict.cause: ts-auth-service is experiencing delay/latency spikes (high p95/p99 and CPU load) which propagate downstream, causing ts-preserve-service to exhibit delays and elevated activity.
final_verdict.explanation: Candidate 'ts-auth-service' has 1 LLM source agreement but supported by keyword matching (log + topology).

metadata.hypothesis: ts-auth-service is experiencing delay/latency spikes (high p95/p99 and CPU load), which propagates to downstream services and elevates overall processing time, causing ts-preserve-service to also show heightened activity and delays.
metadata.llm_reasoning: Metric summary shows strong anomalies for ts-auth-service (cpu_z +10.6, p95/p99 Δms +436.6/+634.4) indicating a delay/root-cause in this service. ts-preserve-service also shows CPU spike (+10.7) and elevated volume delta, suggesting it is downstream. Volume-based signals also indicate activity increases in ts-preserve-service and related upstream pressure. With upstream dependency mapping (ts-preserve-service depends on ts-auth-service), ts-auth-service is the most plausible root cause. No explicit error logs are present, so the pattern relies on metric anomalies and downstream impact.
